scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @scheduler/shared && npm run dev -w @scheduler/web
scripts.dev:bot: npm run build -w @scheduler/shared && npm run dev -w @scheduler/bot
scripts.build: npm run build -w @scheduler/shared && npm run build -w @scheduler/bot && npm run build -w @scheduler/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @scheduler/shared && npm run build -w @scheduler/shared && npm run typecheck -w @scheduler/bot && npm run typecheck -w @scheduler/web
